title: CraftableChainmailArmor
description: Introduces a new recipe and crafting method to vanilla Minecraft, allowing you to craft chain armor (compatible with versions 1.20 through 26.1.1).
body:
This datapack adds a new recipe and crafting method to vanilla Minecraft and works on servers. It provides a simple vanilla-friendly way to obtain chain armor.

**Crafting:**

![chainmail-helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ff7f73c54f9bc9eee4c9e8597d34445b8972313.png)
![chainmail-chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e55b96737d3ace466a57bf248b78af09bd07d93c.png)
![chainmail-leggings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db4da80c287e77157d67dce31cef72bcd984cd20.png)![chainmail-boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e52d65b7c04db3f7a02e419f5aa8aa657d690b59.png)

**Details 📝**
Chain Armor Recipe is compatible with versions 1.20 to 1.26.1.1

Adds a new recipe to the crafting table 🌐

Compatible with other recipe datapacks.
